introSection: L'il Renegade was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Southern Adventures in Huntsville, Alabama, USA. It was formerly located at Sertoma Playland. The roller coaster was manufactured in 1957.
fullText: L'il Renegade was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Southern Adventures in Huntsville, Alabama, USA. It was formerly located at Sertoma Playland. The roller coaster was manufactured in 1957.
